# DPmixGPD

DPmixGPD fits **Dirichlet process mixture models** (CRP or
stick-breaking backends) with an **optional Generalized Pareto (GPD)
tail** so you can model the bulk and extremes *together* and still get
clean, user-friendly prediction APIs.

## Install

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("arnabaich96/DPmixGPD")
```

## Quickstart

``` r
library(DPmixGPD)

set.seed(1)
y <- abs(rnorm(120)) + 0.2

bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y,
  backend = "crp",
  kernel  = "lognormal",
  GPD     = TRUE,
  Kmax    = 6,
  mcmc = list(niter = 800, nburnin = 200, thin = 2, nchains = 1, seed = 1)
)

fit <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle)

summary(fit)
plot(fit, family = "trace")

# predictive quantities
predict(fit, type = "quantile", p = c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9))
```

## Learn the package by goal

### I want to…

- **Get oriented fast** →
  [Introduction](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v01-introduction.md)
- **See every available distribution and its d/p/q/r helpers** →
  [Available
  Distributions](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v02-available-distributions.md)
- **Understand the full workflow (spec → bundle → MCMC)** → [Basic Model
  Workflow](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v03-basic-model-compile-run.md)

### Unconditional models (y only)

- [DPmix with
  CRP](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v04-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.md)
- [DPmix with
  SB](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v05-unconditional-DPmix-SB.md)
- [DPmixGPD with
  CRP](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v06-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.md)
- [DPmixGPD with
  SB](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v07-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.md)

### Conditional models (y \| X)

- [Conditional DPmix
  CRP](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v08-conditional-DPmix-CRP.md)
- [Conditional DPmix
  SB](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v09-conditional-DPmix-SB.md)
- [Conditional DPmixGPD
  CRP](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v10-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.md)
- [Conditional DPmixGPD
  SB](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v11-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.md)

### Causal inference (two-arm outcome models)

- [Same Backend
  CRP](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v12-causal-same-backend-CRP.md)
- [Same Backend
  SB](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v13-causal-same-backend-SB.md)
- [Different Backends (CRP for
  PS)](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v14-causal-different-backends-CRP.md)
- [Different Backends (SB for
  PS)](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v15-causal-different-backends-SB.md)

## Kernel reference (short pages)

These pages are quick reminders of parameterizations and the relevant
exported helpers.

- [Normal
  kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-normal.md)
- [Lognormal
  kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-lognormal.md)
- [Gamma
  kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-gamma.md)
- [Inverse Gaussian
  kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-invgauss.md)
- [Laplace
  kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-laplace.md)
- [Amoroso
  kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-amoroso.md)
- [Cauchy
  kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-cauchy.md)

## Core S3 methods

Fitted model objects (`mixgpd_fit` and `dpmixgpd_causal_fit`) support:

- [`print()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/print.html),
  [`summary()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/summary.html)
- [`params()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/params.md)
- [`plot()`](https://rdrr.io/r/graphics/plot.default.html)
- [`predict()`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/predict.html) (density / CDF /
  quantile / survival; causal: effects)
- [`fitted()`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/fitted.values.html)

## Help and project links

- Function reference:
  [Reference](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/index.md)
- Changelog:
  [News](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/news/index.md)
- Source + issues: GitHub (see the navbar link)

## Package health

| Metric | Current value | Source |
|----|----|----|
| Test coverage (tests) | `0%` | `inst/extdata/coverage_status.json` (run `tools/update_coverage_status.R`) |
| Coverage helper | [`DPmixGPD::coverage_status()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/coverage_status.md) | runs [`covr::package_coverage()`](http://covr.r-lib.org/reference/package_coverage.md) and can refresh the JSON file |
| Status reader | [`DPmixGPD::read_coverage_status()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/read_coverage_status.md) | easy lookup for badges or pkgdown site |

# Package index

## All functions

- [`dAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso.md)
  [`pAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso.md)
  [`qAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso.md)
  [`rAmoroso()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso.md)
  : Amoroso distribution
- [`dAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  [`pAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  [`rAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  [`qAmorosoGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_gpd.md)
  : Amoroso with a GPD tail
- [`dAmorosoMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_mix.md)
  [`pAmorosoMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_mix.md)
  [`rAmorosoMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_mix.md)
  [`qAmorosoMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_mix.md)
  : Amoroso mixture distribution
- [`dAmorosoMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_mixgpd.md)
  [`pAmorosoMixGpd()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/amoroso_mixgpd.md)

  : Amoroso mixture with a GPD tail
- [`ate()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/ate.md) :
  Average treatment effects (ATE)
- [`build_causal_bundle()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/build_causal_bundle.md)
  : Build a causal bundle (design + two outcome arms)
- [`build_nimble_bundle()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/build_nimble_bundle.md)
  : Build a NIMBLE bundle

  : Cauchy distribution

  [`pCauchyMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/cauchy_mix.md)
  [`rCauchyMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/cauchy_mix.md)
  [`qCauchyMix()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/cauchy_mix.md)
  : Cauchy mixture distribution

  : causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3 dataset

  : causal_alt_pos500_p5_k4_tail dataset

  : Extract posterior mean parameters in original form

  : Plot QTE results

  : Plot MCMC diagnostics for a MixGPD fit (ggmcmc backend)
- [`plot(`*`<mixgpd_predict>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/plot.mixgpd_predict.md)
  : Plot prediction results
- [`predict(`*`<dpmixgpd_causal_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/predict.dpmixgpd_causal_fit.md)
  : Predict from a causal fit
- [`predict(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/predict.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Predict from a MixGPD fit
- [`print(`*`<dpmixgpd_bundle>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/print.dpmixgpd_bundle.md)
  : Print a dpmixgpd bundle
- [`print(`*`<dpmixgpd_causal_bundle>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/print.dpmixgpd_causal_bundle.md)
  : Print a causal bundle
- [`print(`*`<dpmixgpd_causal_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/print.dpmixgpd_causal_fit.md)
  : Print a causal fit
- [`print(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/print.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Print a MixGPD fitted object
- [`print(`*`<mixgpd_summary>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/print.mixgpd_summary.md)
  : Print a MixGPD summary object
- [`qte()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/qte.md) :
  Quantile treatment effects (QTE)
- [`read_coverage_status()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/read_coverage_status.md)
  : Read stored coverage status
- [`residuals(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/residuals.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Residuals for a MixGPD fit
- [`run_mcmc_bundle_manual()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/run_mcmc_bundle_manual.md)
  : Run MCMC for a prepared bundle
- [`run_mcmc_causal()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/run_mcmc_causal.md)
  : Run MCMC for a causal bundle
- [`sim_bulk_tail()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/sim_bulk_tail.md)
  : Simulate bulk + tail data
- [`sim_causal_qte()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/sim_causal_qte.md)
  : Simulate causal QTE data
- [`sim_survival_tail()`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/sim_survival_tail.md)
  : Simulate survival tail data
- [`summary(`*`<dpmixgpd_bundle>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/summary.dpmixgpd_bundle.md)
  : Summarize a dpmixgpd bundle
- [`summary(`*`<dpmixgpd_causal_bundle>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/summary.dpmixgpd_causal_bundle.md)
  : Summarize a causal bundle
- [`summary(`*`<dpmixgpd_causal_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/summary.dpmixgpd_causal_fit.md)
  : Summarize a causal fit
- [`summary(`*`<mixgpd_fit>`*`)`](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/reference/summary.mixgpd_fit.md)
  : Summarize a MixGPD fitted object

# Articles

### Getting Started

- [1. Introduction to
  DPmixGPD](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v01-introduction.md):
- [2. Available Distributions and Related
  Functions](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v02-available-distributions.md):
- [3. Basic Workflow: Model Specification, Bundle, &
  MCMC](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v03-basic-model-compile-run.md):

### Unconditional Models

DPmix and DPmixGPD without covariates

- [4. Unconditional DPmix with CRP
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v04-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.md):
- [5. Unconditional DPmix with Stick-Breaking
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v05-unconditional-DPmix-SB.md):
- [6. Unconditional DPmixGPD with CRP
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v06-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.md):
- [7. Unconditional DPmixGPD with Stick-Breaking
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v07-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.md):

### Conditional Models

DPmix and DPmixGPD with covariates

- [8. Conditional DPmix with CRP
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v08-conditional-DPmix-CRP.md):
- [9. Conditional DPmix with Stick-Breaking
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v09-conditional-DPmix-SB.md):
- [10. Conditional DPmixGPD with CRP
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v10-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.md):
- [11. Conditional DPmixGPD with Stick-Breaking
  Backend](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v11-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.md):

### Causal Inference

Treatment effects with propensity score modeling

- [12. Causal Inference: Same Backend (CRP) - Normal
  Kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v12-causal-same-backend-CRP.md):
- [13. Causal Inference: Same Backend (SB) - Laplace
  Kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v13-causal-same-backend-SB.md):
- [14. Causal Inference: Mixed Backends (Bulk-only) - Cauchy
  Kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v14-causal-different-backends-CRP.md):
- [15. Causal Inference: Mixed Backends with GPD - Amoroso
  Kernel](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/v15-causal-different-backends-SB.md):

### Kernel Reference

Short reminders of parameterizations and exported helpers

- [Kernel reference:
  Normal](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-normal.md):
- [Kernel reference:
  Lognormal](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-lognormal.md):
- [Kernel reference:
  Gamma](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-gamma.md):
- [Kernel reference: Inverse
  Gaussian](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-invgauss.md):
- [Kernel reference:
  Laplace](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-laplace.md):
- [Kernel reference:
  Amoroso](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-amoroso.md):
- [Kernel reference:
  Cauchy](https://arnabaich96.github.io/DPmixGPD/articles/kernel-cauchy.md):
